days.text: Mainly cloudy. A few showers. A few thunderstorms at first. Light winds, becoming force 2 to 3 south to southwesterly winds with gusts.
Cloudy apart from sunny intervals. Force 2 to 3 south to southwesterly winds.
Mainly cloudy. One or two showers. Force 2 to 4 south to southeasterly winds.
Cloudy apart from sunny intervals. One or two showers. Force 3 to 4 southerly winds.
Cloudy apart from sunny intervals. One or two showers. Force 3 to 4 southerly winds, occasionally force 5.
